event: high sanguineous output from abdominal wound
multidisciplinary team meeting (trauma/critical care surgery, vascular surgery, radiology, cardiology/endovascular lead)
activation of semihybrid circulatory dynamics laboratory
ultrasound-guided access of right femoral vein
IVC venogram (power injector via 5F Omni flush catheter)
no apparent blush in retrohepatic IVC (initial venogram)
tilting of first cuff (incomplete seal, continued blush)
deployment of second Gore TAG endograft cuff (28 × 4.5 cm)
access site closure (monofilament figure-of-eight cutaneous stitch)
planned clopidogrel 75 mg daily for 6 months
no clinical signs of infection at follow-up
